discovery_fixes.issue: Missing items_for directive to iterate over connections array. Emit structure was accessing response.connections directly instead of iterating over the array.
discovery_fixes.fix: Added items_for: '{{ response.connections }}' and changed all field references from response.connections.* to item.*

discovery_fixes.issue: Missing items_for directive to iterate over virtualInterfaces array. Emit structure was accessing response.virtualInterfaces directly instead of iterating over the array.
discovery_fixes.fix: Added items_for: '{{ response.virtualInterfaces }}' and changed all field references from response.virtualInterfaces.* to item.*

field_path_fixes.issue: Field paths were item.connections.portEncryptionStatus and item.connections.encryptionMode, fixed to item.portEncryptionStatus and item.encryptionMode
Field path was item.connections.macSecKeys, fixed to item.macSecKeys
Field path was item.virtualInterfaces.bgpPeers, fixed to item.bgpPeers
Field path was item.connections.hasLogicalRedundancy, fixed to item.hasLogicalRedundancy

Was using describe_connections but checking virtualInterfaces fields. Changed to use list_virtual_interface_test_history (describe_virtual_interfaces). Field paths were item.virtualInterfaces.*, fixed to item.*
